synopsis: Star Wars Insider 43 is the forty-third issue of Star Wars Insider magazine. It was published in April 1999. Three cover variants were available for issue 43: a newsstand version featuring Qui-Gon Jinn, a subscriber-exclusive version featuring Darth Maul, and a Previews Exclusive version similar to the subscriber version but with different coloring for the Star Wars Insider logo.
title: Insider #43
